steps.name: admin-adr
steps.summary: ADR-014 추가, PRD MVP 제외 Admin 한 줄을 읽기 전용 예외(ADR)로 갱신

steps.name: backend-admin-api
steps.summary: UserRole.ADMIN, V9 ENUM+시드, /admin/summary, Security hasRole(ADMIN), 공개가입 ADMIN 거부, AdminControllerTest+UserServiceTest, resolveUserRole(ADMIN) 정합. 전체 check는 Testcontainers 4IT Docker API 이슈로 환경 의존

steps.name: web-admin-dashboard
steps.summary: web /admin + /api/admin/summary, UserRole+AdminSummaryResponse 타입, login ADMIN→/admin, mobile UserRole+ADMIN, API_CONVENTIONS·README, npm run lint+build 통과
